prompt_latex: The sum of the first $n$ terms of an arithmetic sequence with first term $2$ and common difference $3$ is $100$. Find $n$.
solution_latex: Set $100=\frac{n}{2}(2\cdot 2+(n-1)3)$. The positive integer solution is $n=8$.
